summary: The US administration is preparing for a fresh round of military strikes against Iran, leading to the cancellation of holiday plans for key military and intelligence officials. Israel is simultaneously preparing for imminent conflict with Iran while conducting deep strikes against Hezbollah infrastructure in Lebanon. Tensions remain high in Gaza and the West Bank with ongoing IDF operations and new international sanctions on settlement products.
key_points: US administration is preparing for new military strikes against Iran, causing officials to cancel Memorial Day plans (Source: @VahidOnline).
IDF is preparing for an imminent Iranian attack as estimates suggest no diplomatic agreement will be reached (Source: @Faytuks_Network/2902).
IDF conducted deep strikes in Lebanon targeting Hezbollah underground weapon production sites and infrastructure in Tyre (Source: @almogboker78/17084).
Iranian armed forces are preparing a 'third battle' plan to target the US and its allies (Source: @kianmeli1/87565).
White House Deputy Chief of Staff posted B-2 bomber footage, signaling potential upcoming strikes against Iran (Source: @lelotsenzura/92095).
IDF eliminated militants crossing the 'yellow line' in both northern and southern Gaza sectors (Source: @N12chat/208681).
Netherlands announced a ban on imports of products from illegal West Bank settlements to increase pressure (Source: @asafroz/49392).
GPS jamming reported in Qatar and Kuwait, indicating regional electronic warfare activity (Source: @lelotsenzura/92084).

sections.executive_summary: The US and Israel are preparing for imminent military strikes against Iran, with US officials canceling leave and the IDF preparing for a direct confrontation. Israel has escalated operations in Lebanon, targeting deep underground Hezbollah production facilities and command centers in Tyre. Regional instability is further evidenced by GPS jamming in the Gulf and continued high-intensity combat in Gaza.

points: The Iranian military is developing a 'third battle' operational plan specifically designed to target the US and its regional allies using 'new and special' methods (Source: @kianmeli1/87565).

Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi held multiple high-level meetings with Pakistani Army Chief Asim Munir to discuss diplomatic initiatives to prevent the escalation of the 'imposed war' by the US and Israel (Source: @SharghDaily/161551).

The Iranian government continues to restrict internet access, citing security risks and threats to national figures as the primary justification for maintaining the blackout (Source: @mamlekate/103566).
Reports indicate the Iranian regime is utilizing digital exchanges like Binance and the financial network of Babak Zanjani to transfer millions of dollars (Source: @mamlekate/103565).

The Pentagon released infrared footage from 2022 showing unidentified anomalous phenomena (UAP) near Iranian waters, though the chain of custody for the video is unverified (Source: @shin_persian/6150).
The IDF is operating under the assumption that no agreement with Iran will be reached and is preparing for an attack to occur within the coming days (Source: @Faytuks_Network/2902).
Reports suggest Israel's diplomatic standing in Washington has deteriorated, with Netanyahu and government officials being excluded from key negotiation talks (Source: @New_security8200/199615).
Israel is attempting to bypass diplomatic exclusions by gathering negotiation intelligence via regional diplomats and intelligence assets within Iran (Source: @New_security8200/199615).
The IDF Air Force conducted a targeted strike in the northern Gaza Strip, resulting in the elimination of several targets (Source: @New_security8200/199623).
Security alerts were triggered in the Kfar Gladi area due to the penetration of hostile aircraft into Israeli airspace (Source: @idf_telegram/23803).
Paratrooper Brigade forces eliminated militants who crossed the 'yellow line' in both the northern and southern sectors of the Gaza Strip (Source: @N12chat/208681).
The Netherlands has officially decided to ban the import of products originating from illegal settlements in the West Bank (Source: @asafroz/49392).
Israeli security forces conducted arrests of children in Ramallah as part of ongoing West Bank operations (Source: @lelotsenzura/92096).
Israeli authorities claim to have thwarted an attempt to smuggle weapons and ammunition into the Palestinian territories via the eastern border (Source: @naya_foriraq/75915).
The IDF conducted an 'unusual' deep strike in Lebanon, destroying a Hezbollah underground facility used for manufacturing weapons targeting Israeli civilians and forces (Source: @almogboker78/17084).
Israeli airstrikes targeted Hezbollah infrastructure in the city of Tyre used for planning and executing terror attacks against the IDF (Source: @almogboker78/17084).
Airstrikes were reported in the areas between Burj al-Shamali and Bazouriyeh, with warnings issued for maximum caution (Source: @redlinkleb/15674).
Airstrikes were also reported in the Al-Qasmiyah region of Lebanon (Source: @redlinkleb/15712).
Hezbollah released footage of drone strikes targeting the Ajl hill, Avivim, Ramim (Hunin), Ramot Naftali, and Ma'ale Golani (Source: @naya_foriraq/75926).
US authorities have indicted Mohammed Baqir al-Saadi, a senior member of the Iraqi Kata'ib Hezbollah militia, for allegedly plotting to assassinate Ivanka Trump (Source: @asafroz/49399).
Al-Saadi reportedly possessed detailed maps of Ivanka Trump's Florida residence and issued online threats against the Trump family (Source: @naya_foriraq/75914).
Significant GPS jamming has been reported across Qatar and Kuwait, suggesting electronic warfare activity in the region (Source: @lelotsenzura/92084).
The UK Maritime Trade Operations reported suspicious vessel activity in the Gulf of Aden/Arabian Sea involving a large boat equipped with ladders and weapons (Source: @N12chat/208679).

key_developments: The Trump administration is preparing for a new round of military strikes against Iran, leading to the cancellation of Memorial Day leave for US military and intelligence officials (Source: @VahidOnline).
The IDF is preparing for an imminent Iranian attack as diplomatic efforts are estimated to have failed (Source: @Faytuks_Network/2902).
Israel conducted deep strikes in Lebanon targeting Hezbollah underground weapon production sites and command centers in Tyre (Source: @almogboker78/17084).
White House Deputy Chief of Staff Dan Scavino posted B-2 bomber footage, which historically preceded US-Israeli strikes in Iran (Source: @lelotsenzura/92095).
Iran's military is preparing a 'third battle' plan to target the US and its allies using new operational methods (Source: @kianmeli1/87565).
The Netherlands has banned imports from illegal West Bank settlements to increase pressure on the Israeli government (Source: @asafroz/49392).
GPS jamming has been detected in Qatar and Kuwait, indicating an increase in regional electronic warfare (Source: @lelotsenzura/92084).
sections.threat_assessment: The threat level is critical. The convergence of US military preparations (B-2 bomber signaling and leave cancellations) and IDF readiness for an Iranian attack suggests a high probability of kinetic action within days. Iran's 'third battle' plan indicates a readiness to retaliate with asymmetric or novel methods, while Hezbollah's production capabilities are being targeted to degrade their launch capacity.
sections.regional_response: Regional actors are reacting with a mix of diplomatic desperation and military readiness. Iran is leveraging Pakistan (via Army Chief Asim Munir) to find diplomatic off-ramps, while simultaneously hardening its internal security and internet controls. Gulf states are experiencing the technical fallout of this tension through widespread GPS jamming.
sections.intelligence_notes: The exclusion of the Netanyahu government from Washington's direct negotiations suggests a significant rift in the US-Israel strategic alignment regarding the Iran timeline. Israel's reliance on regional intelligence and Iranian assets to track these talks indicates a breakdown in formal communication channels. The targeting of Hezbollah's underground production sites suggests the IDF is attempting to neutralize the 'arsenal' before a wider regional escalation.
